description: You are a Product Designer at a startup. Create a low-fidelity wireframe for the 'FreshCart' mobile app's guest checkout flow using draw.io, based on the design brief at '~/Desktop/design_brief.txt'. The diagram must include three mobile phone screens (Cart, Payment, and Order Success) using actual phone container shapes. Include the specific item names and prices from the brief and connect the screens with arrows to show the user flow (Cart to Payment to Success). Save the diagram as '~/Desktop/checkout_flow.drawio' and export it as a PNG image to '~/Desktop/checkout_flow.png'.
